name: Process Vehicle Decommission
description: Inventory management process for vehicle decommission

steps.title: Assess Vehicle Inventory
steps.description: Evaluate all inventory items associated with vehicle

substeps.title: Inventory all removable parts
substeps.description: Catalog all parts that can be salvaged for reuse

substeps.title: Recover all company tools
substeps.description: Collect and account for all tools assigned to vehicle

substeps.title: Collect remaining supplies
substeps.description: Gather any unused supplies or materials

steps.title: Categorize Recoverable Items
steps.description: Sort items by condition and reuse potential

substeps.title: Identify reusable parts
substeps.description: Mark parts in good condition for reuse in other vehicles

substeps.title: Identify sellable items
substeps.description: Mark items that can be sold to recover value

substeps.title: Identify scrap/disposal items
substeps.description: Mark items for scrap or proper disposal

steps.title: Update Inventory Management System
steps.description: Process all inventory changes in system

substeps.title: Check reusable items back into inventory
substeps.description: Add recoverable items back to available inventory

substeps.title: Schedule disposal of unusable items
substeps.description: Arrange proper disposal for items that cannot be reused

substeps.title: Update vehicle inventory status
substeps.description: Mark vehicle as decommissioned in inventory system

substeps.title: Generate inventory recovery report
substeps.description: Create detailed report of all recovered items

substeps.title: Submit financial impact report
substeps.description: Provide finance team with recovery value information
